title: Savory Malaysian Vegetable Stir-fry
description: A whole30-friendly, crisp, savory dish featuring a blend of fresh vegetables and chopped parsley in a quick stir-fry that’s perfect for those with busy schedules.

ingredients.name: 1 cup mixed vegetables (e.g., bell peppers, broccoli, carrots), diced
ingredients.notes: Use whole or spiralized for added texture

ingredients.name: 1 tbsp soy sauce (or tamari for gluten-free option)

instructions: Heat a non-stick pan over medium-high heat.
Add minced garlic and sauté for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add mixed vegetables and stir-fry for about 5 minutes or until tender-crisp.
Drizzle in soy sauce, sesame oil, and black pepper. Stir well to coat the vegetables evenly.
Remove from heat and garnish with fresh parsley before serving.
